data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Mining Companies Double Global Hashrate Share
data.description: According to Odaily, data tracked by JPMorgan reveals that U.S.-listed Bitcoin mining companies accounted for 29% of the global hashrate in February, nearly doubling their share from a year ago. The report highlights a 6% increase in the Bitcoin network's hashrate this month. However, JPMorgan notes that daily profitability from crypto mining has decreased by 13% since the end of January.

data.title: IntoTheBlock: Memecoin’s total market value falls to November 2024 levels
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News IntoTheBlock posted on the X platform that "After several months of decline, the market value of Meme coin is close to the level of November 2024, which has actually wiped out all the gains brought by the winter memecoin craze."

data.title: A user lost nearly $630,000 worth of Aave WETH and 2 Doodles by signing a phishing transaction
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Scam Sniffer monitoring, a user lost $629,812 worth of Aave WETH (approximately 225.08 aEthWETH) and 2 Doodles due to signing multiple phishing transactions.

data.title: MicroStrategy did not disclose last week's bitcoin purchases
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Aggr News published on the X platform, MicroStrategy did not disclose information on Bitcoin purchases and stock sales last week.

In parallel, smart contracts have emerged as a groundbreaking...

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: US-listed Bitcoin mining companies accounted for 29% of global hash rate in February
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan Chase tracking data shows that in February, the global hash rate of US-listed Bitcoin mining companies accounted for 29%, almost twice as much as a year ago. The report pointed out that the Bitcoin network hash rate rose by 6% this month. However, JPMorgan Chase said that the daily profitability of crypto mining has dropped by 13% from the end of January. (Coindesk)

data.title: AscendEX will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI5)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI5) at 21:00 on February 18, opening the BROCCOLI5/USDT trading pair, and deposits are now open.

data.title: Gate.io Launches Rivalz (RIZ) Spot Trading, Launchpool Starts the First Phase of RIZ Mining
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Rivalz (RIZ) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 21, 2025. At the same time, Gate.io Launchpool will start the first phase of RIZ mining at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 18, 2025, for a period of 3 days. Users only need to pledge USDT and BTC to earn airdrops every hour. The USDT novice pool is estimated to have an annualized rate of 121.67%, and the minimum pledge is 0.1 USDT to participate. The second phase of mining will be launched simultaneously with RIZ spot trading, supporting users to pledge RIZ and GT to earn airdrops, with an estimated annualized rate of 1703.33%.

data.title: Majority Of Investors View U.S. Stock Valuations As Overpriced
data.description: According to Odaily, a recent global fund manager survey conducted by Bank of America in February revealed that 89% of surveyed investors believe U.S. stock valuations are excessively high. This marks the highest level of concern regarding stock valuations since at least April 2001. Over the past decade, an average of 81% of fund manager investors surveyed have consistently viewed U.S. stock valuations as overvalued.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Supply Barrier At $97,000, Analyst Reports
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez stated on the X platform that Bitcoin encounters a significant supply barrier at the $97,000 price level, with 1.88 million coins. In contrast, there is a support level at $94,500 with only 695,000 coins. This imbalance could play a crucial role in Bitcoin's next price movement.
